page.title: Head of the Left Bureau of Imperial Attendants

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大舎人寮]][[zh:大舍人寮]]


'''Ōtoneri-ryō''' (大舎人寮) was one of the institutions under the {{ill|Ministry of the Center|en|Ministry of the Center|qid=Q6867690|lt=Ministry of the Center|1=Ministry of the Center}} in the {{ill|Ritsuryō|en|Ritsuryō|qid=Q742460|lt=Ritsuryō system|1=Ritsuryō}}. Initially, there were left and right Ōtoneri-ryō offices, but in Daidō 3 (808), the Left Ōtoneri-ryō and Right Ōtoneri-ryō were merged into a single Ōtoneri-ryō.

== Responsibilities ==
The Ōtoneri-ryō was responsible for managing {{ill|Ōtoneri|ja|大舎人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoneri|qq=}} (imperial attendants) based on rosters. The ōtoneri were paired with {{ill|Udoneri|ja|内舎人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Udoneri|qq=}}, serving the {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} by performing night watch duties ({{ruby|宿直|とのい}}) and various other tasks. They frequently assisted in complex administrative duties, effectively functioning as a training ground for future {{ill|officials|ja|官吏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/officials|1=government official|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8985067}}. During the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}}, some ōtoneri were occasionally promoted to {{ill|Naishū|ja|内豎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naishū|1=naiju|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11394596}}, while others transitioned from naishū to ōtoneri.

On the 14th day of the 6th month of Enryaku 14 (795), a directive from the {{ill|Shikibu-shō|en|Shikibu-shō|qid=Q3727885|lt=Ministry of Ceremonial Affairs|1=Shikibu-shō}} stipulated that ōtoneri positions should be filled by descendants of officials ({{ill|Protected appointments system for hereditary privileges in Asia|en|Protected appointments system for hereditary privileges in Asia|qid=Q11621855|lt=Protected appointments|1=Protected appointments system for hereditary privileges in Asia}}), selecting capable candidates with refined demeanor and proficiency in writing and arithmetic while excluding unskilled workers and individuals from outside the capital. However, in Daidō 1 (807), it was decreed that only descendants of officials could be appointed ōtoneri.<ref>『{{ill|Ruiyū Sandai Kyaku|ja|類聚三代格|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ruiyū Sandai Kyaku|1=Ruijū Sandai Kyaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11665185}}』巻4, "加減諸司官員并廃置事〈雑任〉" 92条, 太政官符, Daidō 1, 12th month, 4th day</ref> The number of ōtoneri was subsequently halved. Although partially restored to the original levels in Daidō 2 (807), the offices were fully merged in Daidō 3 (808). Later, in Kōnin pp (820), an edict reduced the number of ōtoneri from 800 to 400.<ref>『{{ill|Ruiyū Sandai Kyaku|ja|類聚三代格|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ruiyū Sandai Kyaku|1=Ruijū Sandai Kyaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11665185}}』巻4, "加減諸司官員并廃置事〈雑任〉" 93条, 太政官符, Kōnin pp, 4th month, 21st day</ref>

== Personnel ==
* Head ({{ill|Jugo-i|ja|従五位上|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugo-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} Rank equivalent) – 1 person
* Assistant ({{ill|Shoroku-i|ja|正六位下|1=Senior Sixth Rank|lt=Senior Sixth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shoroku-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正六位}} Rank equivalent) – 1 person
* Senior Clerk ({{ill|Shichii|ja|正七位下|1=Senior Seventh Rank|lt=Senior Seventh Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichii|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正七位}} Rank equivalent) – 1 person
* Junior Clerk ({{ill|Shichii|ja|従七位下|1=Junior Seventh Rank|lt=Junior Seventh Rank, Lower Grade|3=従七位|1=Junior Seventh Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichii|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Seventh Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従七位}} Rank equivalent) – 1 person
* Senior Official ({{ill|Hachi-i|ja|従八位上|1=Junior Eighth Rank|lt=Junior Eighth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従八位}} Rank equivalent) – 1 person
* Junior Official ({{ill|Hachi-i|ja|従八位下|1=Junior Eighth Rank|lt=Junior Eighth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachi-i|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従八位}} Rank equivalent) – 1 person
* {{ill|Ōtoneri|ja|大舎人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoneri|qq=}}
* {{ill|Shisei|ja|史生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shisei|1=shishō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11412126}} – newly established
* Bureau Chief – newly established
* {{ill|Shibu|ja|使部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shibu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Naokichō|ja|直丁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naokichō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
